narrative: Lead AI Engineer at Razorpay with seven years of experience, bringing product‑focused AI expertise from a fast‑growing fintech. The standout factor is the candidate’s above‑average alignment with the search‑and‑retrieval job description, reflected in a strong match on core technologies. They have hands‑on experience with LlamaIndex, pgvector and Learning‑to‑Rank, and have built production pipelines using Elasticsearch, PyTorch and scikit‑learn—exactly the stack the role demands. Their experience level sits square in the 5‑9 year band, though they are based in Jaipur, which may affect immediate on‑site availability. A minor concern is limited visibility into notice‑period details, which could impact timing.
